hooks.command: filepath="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$filepath" in */package-lock.json|*/.env|*/.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit lock files or .env files' >&2; exit 2;; *) exit 0;; esac
filepath="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; if [ -z "$filepath" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$filepath" in *.html|*.css|*.js|*.json|*.md) npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; exit 0;; *) exit 0;; esac
filepath="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; if [ -z "$filepath" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$filepath" in *.html) npx html-validate "$filepath" 2>&1 | head -20; exit 0;; *) exit 0;; esac
